name: Sobolev Spaces
description: W^{k,p}, weak derivatives. Sobolev embedding. Rellich–Kondrachov. Weak solutions.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: W^{k,p}\n‖D^αu‖ₚ fin"]
    D2["Def: Weak derivative\n∫ u D^αφ = (-1)^α∫ vφ"]
    D3["Def: H^k = W^{k,2}\nHilbert"]
    D4["Def: Trace operator\nγ: W¹→L²(∂Ω)"]
    T1["Thm: Sobolev embed\nW^{k,p}⊂L^q"]
    T2["Thm: Rellich–Kondrachov\nW¹↪L^p compact"]
    T3["Thm: Poincaré\n‖u‖≤C‖∇u‖"]
    T4["Thm: Weak soln\nu∈H¹₀, a(u,v)=F(v)"]
    T5["Thm: Regularity\n−Δu=f smooth⇒u smooth"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> D1
    D3 --> T4
    D4 --> T4
    T1 --> T2
    T3 --> T4
    T4 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
